lane_title: RAG Architecture, Chunking, and Embedding Strategy
title: semantic markdown
summary: semantic markdown is a core retrieval concept for RAG Architecture, Chunking, and Embedding Strategy. In AIWF it should be stored with source path, task context, failure conditions, and a practical use/wrap/document/build decision when applicable.
